revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Country data Kingdom of Romania]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data Kingdom of Romania]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Restored revision 1240226842 by [[Special:Contributions/CommonsDelinker|CommonsDelinker]] ([[User talk:CommonsDelinker|talk]]): Wrong color shades
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Kingdom of Romania | shortname alias = Romania | flag alias = Flag of Romania.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of Romania (1922–1947).svg | link alias-naval = Royal Romanian Navy | link alias-air force = Royal Romanian Air Force | flag alias-army = Romanian Army Flag - 1940 used model.svg | link alias-army = Romanian Land Forces{{!}}Royal Romanian Army | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of Romania (1922–1947).svg | link alias-navy = Royal Romanian Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | related1 = Romania | related2 = Wallachia | related3 = Moldavia | related4 = Transylvania | cat = Romanian kingdom </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Kingdom_of_Romania here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Kingdom_of_Romania for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Kingdom of Romania | shortname alias = Romania | flag alias = Flag of Romania.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of Romania (1922–1947).svg | link alias-naval = Royal Romanian Navy | link alias-air force = Royal Romanian Air Force | flag alias-army = Romanian Army Flag - 1940 used model.svg | link alias-army = Romanian Land Forces{{!}}Royal Romanian Army | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of Romania (1922–1947).svg | link alias-navy = Royal Romanian Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | related1 = Romania | related2 = Wallachia | related3 = Moldavia | related4 = Transylvania | cat = Romanian kingdom </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
